name: Breach Notification Compliance Workflow
description: Manages the regulatory breach notification compliance workflow from initial assessment through regulator filing. Riggs AI performs a data exfiltration analysis to determine if a notifiable breach occurred and identifies applicable regulations (GDPR, HIPAA, state breach laws, etc.). If a notifiable breach is confirmed, legal counsel approval is required before proceeding. A code node generates the notification timeline based on applicable regulations (e.g., 72 hours for GDPR). The workflow creates a Jira epic to track all notification obligations, drafts regulator and affected individual notifications, and posts compliance milestones to the legal team. Non-notifiable events are logged and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create breach notification tracking epic and sub-tasks for each regulatory obligation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Coordinate with legal team and post compliance milestone updates

config.description: Triggers when a potential data breach or PII exposure is detected requiring notification assessment

config.additional_instructions: Assess whether this incident constitutes a notifiable data breach. Determine: 1) Type of data exposed (PII, PHI, financial), 2) Number of affected individuals, 3) Applicable regulations (GDPR, HIPAA, state breach laws), 4) Whether notification is legally required, 5) Recommended notification timeline.
config.description: AI-powered breach assessment to determine notification obligations and applicable regulatory frameworks
Route based on whether the AI assessment determined this is a legally notifiable breach
Legal counsel and Privacy Officer must approve the breach notification before regulatory filings proceed
Calculate regulatory notification deadlines based on applicable regulations and breach discovery time
Create a Jira epic to track all breach notification obligations and deadlines
Post breach notification details to the legal/privacy Slack channel for coordination
Send an executive briefing to the CISO about the notifiable breach and notification timeline
Breach notification compliance workflow activated — deadlines calculated, Jira epic created, legal and CISO notified

parameters.note:
Breach notification assessment complete. This incident does not constitute a notifiable data breach under applicable regulations. No notification required.
